sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_min_values (value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_min_values (value1, value2) VALUES (sql_min(1.5, 2.5), sql_min(3.0, 1.0));
UPDATE test_min_values SET value1 = sql_min(value1, 0.5) WHERE value2 > 2.0;
SELECT value1, value2, sql_min(value1, value2) AS min_value FROM test_min_values;
DELETE FROM test_min_values WHERE sql_min(value1, value2) < 1.0;
